title: DDNS
enabledDesc: The scheduler keeps this record in sync automatically.
emptyState: No DDNS records yet. Add a hostname and its A record will be kept pointed at your public IP automatically.
providerHint: DDNS currently supports Cloudflare and DuckDNS only. Other provider types are not listed.
noProviders: No Cloudflare/DuckDNS providers available. Add one under Certificates > DNS Providers first.
managedHint: This record is managed by a proxy host. Change its DDNS settings from the host's edit screen.
importHint: Enables DDNS auto-registration on the selected proxy hosts and creates a managed DDNS record for each host's domains.
importNoHosts: No proxy hosts yet. Add a proxy host first.
importNoHostsSelected: Select at least one proxy host.
checkIntervalDesc: How often the scheduler checks the public IP and renews DDNS records. (minimum 1 minute)
